option.name: content
option.value: Avoid overly verbose descriptions or unnecessary details.$GIT_BRANCH_NAME

project.component: { "keyToString": { "Gradle.QuadTrivia [clean].executor": "Run", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "RunOnceActivity.MCP Project settings loaded": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "SHELLCHECK.PATH": "/Users/ronaldjongen/Library/Application Support/JetBrains/IntelliJIdea2025.3/plugins/Shell Script/shellcheck", "WebServerToolWindowPanel.toolwindow.highlight.mappings": "true", "WebServerToolWindowPanel.toolwindow.highlight.symlinks": "true", "WebServerToolWindowPanel.toolwindow.show.date": "false", "WebServerToolWindowPanel.toolwindow.show.permissions": "false", "WebServerToolWindowPanel.toolwindow.show.size": "false", "com.intellij.ml.llm.matterhorn.ej.ui.settings.DefaultModelSelectionForGA.v1": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "main", "junie.onboarding.icon.badge.shown": "true", "kotlin-language-version-configured": "true", "last_opened_file_path": "/Users/ronaldjongen/IdeaProjects/QuadTrivia/quad-trivia-frontend/src/views", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "project.structure.last.edited": "Project", "project.structure.proportion": "0.0", "project.structure.side.proportion": "0.0", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "ml.llm.AIAssistantPromptsLibrary", "to.speed.mode.migration.done": "true", "ts.external.directory.path": "/Applications/IntelliJ IDEA.app/Contents/plugins/javascript-plugin/jsLanguageServicesImpl/external", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" }, "keyToStringList": { "vue.recent.templates": [ "Vue Composition API Component" ] } }

task.summary: Default task

Initialize project structure with backend and frontend setup
Added initial files for the backend (using Spring Boot) and frontend (Vue.js) including APIs, basic components, data types, and configurations. Setup Gradle and Docker configurations for backend and frontend environments.
Initialize Vue 3 frontend with Vite, Pinia, Vue Router, and ESLint configurations.

Implement backend security, frontend routing, and Docker setup
Added Spring Security configurations, APIs for authentication and quizzes, and Vue 3 routes with centralized paths. Introduced Docker settings for backend and frontend, and integrated Nginx as a reverse proxy. Updated folder structure and dependencies to improve modularity.
Redesign login page with enhanced UI/UX, dynamic error handling, and responsive styling. Fix typo in onSubmit method name.
correct password
chore: add .gitignore
refactor: update LoginResult type and clean up commented code in authentication logic
Refactor `LoginResult` field name, add unit tests for `QuizController` and `AuthenticationController`, and optimize service and controller constructors with Lombok

Refactor frontend layout by introducing AppLayout component, decoding HTML entities in questions, and enhancing styles across quiz and result views. Add a README file with design choices and architecture details.

Add unit tests for authentication store and LoginView component
- Implement comprehensive tests for `authenticationStore`. - Add tests to validate `LoginView` functionality on login success, failure, and error handling. - Update `package-lock.json` for new dependencies.
chore: update and expand .gitignore files, add .dockerignore for frontend
feat: refactor logout logic, add logout button and update user display
Refactor tests for `LoginView` and `authenticationApi` to improve input selection, add login/logout coverage, and clean up mocks.
Refactor: Routing
Feature:add playwright tests for quiz flow and logout, update package.json and add e2e config for playwright tests
Feature add test for router auth guard

feat: add Vue i18n integration, update dependencies, and refine component tests
- Integrated Vue i18n for localization support in the frontend. - Added `vue-i18n` and related dependencies. - Updated `QuestionCard` and `AppLayout` components for i18n compatibility. - Enhanced `main.ts` to include i18n setup. - Switched `npm install` to `npm ci` for cleaner dependency management in Dockerfile. - Updated `axios` dependency. - Refactored question card to decode HTML entities in options.
chore: add dockerignore

Refactor quiz logic and enhance error handling.
Removed `correctOptionId` to prevent data leakage during quiz sessions. Added exception handling for quiz ownership and session not found scenarios. Improved i18n, test coverage, and frontend error handling for a better user experience.

Refactor localization and frontend components for i18n support
Improved the ResultView and QuizView to utilize translation strings for better internationalization. Updated Dutch locale with additional translations and adjusted fallback locale to 'nl'. Also, corrected component and variable usages for consistency and removed redundant backend configuration.

Enable CSRF protection and update authentication flow
Added support for CSRF tokens in the backend and frontend to enhance security. Modified login session handling and introduced a bootstrap method in the auth store to initialize CSRF tokens and user data. Adjusted router and API logic to align with these changes.

Enable CSRF protection and update authentication flow
Added support for CSRF tokens in the backend and frontend to enhance security. Modified login session handling and introduced a bootstrap method in the auth store to initialize CSRF tokens and user data. Adjusted router and API logic to align with these changes.
Refactor `ResultView` test: update `t` function mock to use stricter typing
chore: fix test using login
chore: fix workspace.xml
chore:remove readme

MESSAGE.value: refactor: update LoginResult type and clean up commented code in authentication logic
Refactor `LoginResult` field name, add unit tests for `QuizController` and `AuthenticationController`, and optimize service and controller constructors with Lombok
Refactor layout structure by introducing `AppLayout` component and enhance HTML decoding in `QuestionCard` and `ResultView`.

Refactor frontend layout by introducing AppLayout component, decoding HTML entities in questions, and enhancing styles across quiz and result views. Add a README file with design choices and architecture details.

Add unit tests for authentication store and LoginView component
- Implement comprehensive tests for `authenticationStore`. - Add tests to validate `LoginView` functionality on login success, failure, and error handling. - Update `package-lock.json` for new dependencies.
chore: update and expand .gitignore files, add .dockerignore for frontend
feat: refactor logout logic, add logout button and update user display
Refactor tests for `LoginView` and `authenticationApi` to improve input selection, add login/logout coverage, and clean up mocks.
Refactor: Routing
Feature:add playwright tests for quiz flow and logout, update package.json and add e2e config for playwright tests
Feature add test for router auth guard

feat: integrate vue-i18n and playwright, update dependencies, and refine frontend tests
- Add `vue-i18n` for localization. - Introduce `playwright` and `@playwright/test` for E2E testing. - Update Dockerfile to use `npm ci` for reproducible builds. - Enhance component accessibility by adding `data-testid` attributes. - Update axios to `1.15.0` and refine result view to use i18n strings. - Improve README with detailed documentation for architecture, setup, and testing.

feat: add Vue i18n integration, update dependencies, and refine component tests
- Integrated Vue i18n for localization support in the frontend. - Added `vue-i18n` and related dependencies. - Updated `QuestionCard` and `AppLayout` components for i18n compatibility. - Enhanced `main.ts` to include i18n setup. - Switched `npm install` to `npm ci` for cleaner dependency management in Dockerfile. - Updated `axios` dependency. - Refactored question card to decode HTML entities in options.
chore: add dockerignore

Refactor quiz logic and enhance error handling.
Removed `correctOptionId` to prevent data leakage during quiz sessions. Added exception handling for quiz ownership and session not found scenarios. Improved i18n, test coverage, and frontend error handling for a better user experience.

Refactor localization and frontend components for i18n support
Improved the ResultView and QuizView to utilize translation strings for better internationalization. Updated Dutch locale with additional translations and adjusted fallback locale to 'nl'. Also, corrected component and variable usages for consistency and removed redundant backend configuration.

Enable CSRF protection and update authentication flow
Added support for CSRF tokens in the backend and frontend to enhance security. Modified login session handling and introduced a bootstrap method in the auth store to initialize CSRF tokens and user data. Adjusted router and API logic to align with these changes.
Refactor `ResultView` test: update `t` function mock to use stricter typing
chore: fix test using login
chore: fix workspace.xml
Chore :add backend
chore:add backend
Add backend project to the repository
chore remove dummy project stuuff
chore:remove readme
